recap: Changed attention file format from bare tabId to tabId:type, added --type flag to add script, updated remove/redraw/state to handle new format
Fixed icon order (fullscreen before attention) and added type-based icon selection (stop vs notification) in tab title builder
Added kitty-tab-attention-remove call in claude wrapper after binary exits, guarded by KITTY_WINDOW_ID check
Added redraw.cleanup() to prune stale attention entries, activeTabId tracking in tabState, both called at end of render cycle
Added threading.Timer in tabs_second_pass to auto-clear attention after 3s on focused tab, with file-I/O-only callback
Added attention icon logic to notification hook: resolves tab ID, checks focus, calls kitty-tab-attention-add --type notification when unfocused
Prune stale manifest entries for closed tabs at end of render cycle in second_pass
